subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Support and my Ultimate Aim! Thou verily knowest the excess of my attachment, the intensity of my love, and the magnitude of my ardent devotion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و سندی و مقصودی انک لتعلم فرط تعلقی و شده حبی و عظیم غرامی و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement
